labels: Enteric tube tip in the proximal stomach.
report:
=== VISUAL_FINDINGS ===
Enteric tube tip is in the proximal stomach.
More prominent right basilar opacity.
Adjacent right pleural effusion.
Endotracheal tube tip in good position.
Bilateral perihilar infiltrates.
Mildly worsened right basilar opacity.
Increased small pleural effusions.
Surgical clips right upper quadrant.
